title: Maanjaave Kaanjaachu Lyrics Kaakka Muttai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Kaakka Muttai Maanjaave Kaanjaachu Song Lyrics
Singer(s): Gaana Bala & Srihari
Music: GV Prakash.

Maanjaave Kaanjaachu,
lottaayi vittaachu.
Kaththaadi kattaachu,
light house-a, thottaachu.

Auto bomb, soodaachu
piece piece-a kilinjaachu.
joottova appitoova,
yaarkkar thaan adichchaachu.

Koiyya gundu aadinaa
dhoni raja pocket-u
tappaasula rocket-u
naangathaan.

Nenja thookki nadappom
undertaker maadhiri
meenula fighter naangathaan.

vellakkaaran naasthava
thunnalaam.
ye thaa thaa thaa
ye thaa thtaa thaa

jabardhasthu irundhaa
naama geththu.
ye thaa thaa thaa
ye thaa thaa thaa.

Maanjaave Kaanjaachu,
lottaayi vittaachu.
Kaththaadi kattaachu,
light house-a, thottaachu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Maanjaave Kaanjaachu?

The song Maanjaave Kaanjaachu expresses themes of joy and celebration, reflecting the carefree spirit of the characters in Kaakka Muttai.

What is the plot context of the movie Kaakka Muttai?

Kaakka Muttai tells the story of two young boys from a slum who dream of tasting pizza, highlighting their struggles and aspirations in a humorous and heartwarming way.

Who are the singers of the song?

The song is sung by Gaana Bala and Srihari, both of whom bring a lively energy to the track.

Who composed the music for Kaakka Muttai?

The music for Kaakka Muttai was composed by GV PrakashKumar, known for his catchy and engaging soundtracks.

When was Maanjaave Kaanjaachu released?

The song Maanjaave Kaanjaachu was released on May 8, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Maanjaave Kaanjaachu, the vibrant energy of the song mirrors the carefree lives of the children in Kaakka Muttai. The upbeat rhythm and playful lyrics evoke a sense of joy and celebration, making it a perfect anthem for parties and gatherings. The song encapsulates the innocence and aspirations of youth, as the characters navigate their dreams amidst the challenges of their environment. Overall, it conveys a message of hope and happiness, resonating with audiences of all ages.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Maanjaave Kaanjaachu from the movie Kaakka Muttai is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, brought to life by the dynamic voices of Gaana Bala and Srihari. With GV Prakash's infectious beats, this song captures the essence of youthful exuberance and fun. Dive into this energetic track that perfectly encapsulates the spirit of the film and its characters!
stanzaMeanings: The yellow has come, it has been thrown away. The stick has been placed, at the lighthouse, it has been planted.
Auto bomb, it has been heated, broken into pieces. Who hit it, who knows?
Yes.. it is getting up.. it is talking, it is lifting.
Yes... what it said is being done, it is separating, it is real.
If the stone hits, the pocket of Dhoni Raja will turn into a rocket, that's us.
We will walk with our hearts lifted like undertakers, we are fighters in the sea.
We can ride on the tuk-tuk. We can go across the sea.
The white man can eat the food. Yes, thaa thaa thaa, yes thaa thaa thaa.
Yes.. it is getting up.. it is talking, it is lifting.
Yes... what it said is being done, it is separating, it is real.
They are gathering, the AC shop is closing, we will do it with a bang.
We won't let go, we will struggle and win, look at us.
If it goes away, the ghost will go. If it is tied, it will rise like a biscuit.
If we are strong, we will get it. Yes, thaa thaa thaa, yes thaa thaa thaa.
Yes.. it is getting up.. it is talking, it is lifting.
Yes... what it said is being done, it is separating, it is real.
The yellow has come, it has been thrown away. The stick has been placed, at the lighthouse, it has been planted.
